authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Gallatin Marina breakwater / Pine Creek Slough / Pine Creek below Hwy. 44
reaches.fromDesc: Inside the breakwater at the Gallatin Marina
reaches.toDesc: Pine Creek Slough and Pine Creek below State Highway 44

reaches.name: Eagle Lake tributaries (including Pine Creek above Hwy. 44)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(44) — Eagle Lake and tributaries (Lassen Co.)
sources.quotedText: Eagle Lake and tributaries (Lassen Co.). (A) Eagle Lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. 2 trout per day. 4 trout in possession.

sources.title: CDFW — Fishing for Eagle Lake Rainbow Trout
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R1 Lassen Eagle Lake Eagle Lake Trout Catchable Put and Take April-May & October-November

sources.title: Eagle Lake (GNIS Feature ID 222812) — Lassen County, California — HomeTownLocator
sources.quotedText: Eagle Lake is a physical feature (lake) in Lassen County.

regulations.humanSummary: Eagle Lake open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Eagle Lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout per day, 4 trout in possession, on Eagle Lake proper.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout per day, 4 trout in possession on Eagle Lake
regulations.verbatimText: 2 trout per day. 4 trout in possession.

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year inside the breakwater at the Gallatin Marina, in Pine Creek Slough, and in Pine Creek below State Highway 44.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year inside the Gallatin Marina breakwater, Pine Creek Slough, and Pine Creek below Hwy. 44
regulations.verbatimText: Eagle Lake inside the break-water at the Gallatin Marina and Pine Creek Slough and Pine Creek below State Highway 44. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Eagle Lake tributaries (including Pine Creek above Hwy. 44) open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Eagle Lake tributaries, including Pine Creek above State Highway 44. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit on Eagle Lake tributaries; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit on Eagle Lake tributaries

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Eagle Lake (Lassen Co.) for catchable-size Eagle Lake Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of April-May & October-November (this entry covers the April-May window). Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Eagle Lake (Lassen Co.) for catchable-size Eagle Lake Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of April-May & October-November (this entry covers the October-November window). Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.
